data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for these exports, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to the affiliate ledger or statement exports. This indicates a gap in the validation process, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of validation for payout-ready affiliate ledger and statement exports.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
